title: Exact Linear Optimization Witnesses

solver_reuse.target: linear optimization objective-threshold QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact LP threshold conflict where the base budget requires x + y <= 4 but the queried objective threshold requires x + y >= 5.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional optimization rows only when they add distinct exact-rational feasibility, duality, or threshold pressure; keep general convex duality and convergence theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed LP feasibility and threshold checks as deterministic QF_LRA formulas.
Replay SAT witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Keep the infeasible threshold on Axeyum's checked Farkas evidence path, including same-artifact tamper rejection.
Add objective-optimality examples only when the certificate route can state primal/dual evidence explicitly.
